reviews.review_title: Glitches bad mods and false reporters
reviews.review_description:
This game has numerous issues that make it unfun and frustrating to play. Bugs are rampant, and mods created by players unfairly report others without valid reasons. Additionally, the owner enforces positive reviews under threat of reporting, which feels coercive and unprofessional.

The game contains many skidded assets, including content from an unreleased game, as well as hats and cosmetics from Big Scary. The lack of originality, combined with basic Unity knowledge, results in a product that feels rushed and amateurish. There are no proper map loaders, and monsters sourced from Sketchfab fail to navigate terrain effectively, leading to multiple monsters in a single map. The level designs are repetitive and uninspired, offering little variety or creativity.

The AI system is poorly implemented—players often have to chase the monsters instead of being pursued, which defeats the purpose. The game has unnecessary rooms, such as an entire area dedicated to promo codes, adding no value to the gameplay experience. The privacy policy is disappointingly short and lacks depth, raising concerns about how user data is handled. Moreover, anti-hand-phasing mechanics are absent, allowing players to glitch into restricted areas, like mod rooms, effortlessly.

Bugs further hamper the experience—for example:
Teleporting to spawn leaves players floating temporarily, allowing them to glitch out of the map and bypass levels.
Attempting to teleport to Level 5 results in falling out of the map, with no way to return to spawn without restarting the game.

Please consider addressing these issues and taking feedback seriously instead of dismissing it.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry and we will make the game better

But don't copy and paste something from someone else 
also we didn't take any assets we made it how we like it we to inspiration from it and it makes out team sad that you guys don't like this.

We are also making a new and improved version of the game.
We love your feedback and take it seriously.

Thank you

Byte Bloc Studios.

reviews.review_description:
This game falls short in numerous ways, making it an overall frustrating experience. It suffers from widespread bugs, including mods that unfairly report players without valid reasons. Additionally, the owner pressures users into leaving positive reviews, threatening to report those who don’t comply—a tactic that feels both unprofessional and manipulative.

The game relies heavily on skidded assets, such as content from an unreleased title and hats and cosmetics from Big Scary. Its lack of originality, coupled with insufficient Unity expertise, results in unpolished gameplay. Monsters from Sketchfab are poorly implemented; they struggle to navigate bumps, leading to an awkward design choice where multiple monsters are placed in the same map. Levels offer little variety, with repetitive layouts that fail to engage.

The AI is clumsy and inefficient—players often have to chase monsters themselves, defeating the purpose of their presence. Several rooms in the game are unnecessary, like the promo code room, which contributes nothing meaningful to the experience. The privacy policy is incredibly brief and poorly thought out, raising concerns about how user data is managed. Moreover, hand-phasing glitches are unaddressed, allowing players to bypass restrictions and access areas like mod rooms with ease.

The game is riddled with bugs that significantly impact playability:
Teleporting to spawn causes players to float temporarily, making it possible to glitch out of the map and cheat levels.
Attempting to teleport to Level 5 results in falling out of the map, forcing players to restart the game to return to spawn.
